| I cannot modify my academic contract at UMOVE. What can I do? | You must complete the following form: <https://www.ujaen.es/servicios/serinco/tramites-y-servicios/estudiantes-entrante sincoming-students> or go in person to the International Relations and Cooperation Service (Building C-2) |
